text: <par>Note the assimilation of the medial consonants.</par>
<par>2d syll. was tagged with now-defunct #1132 <latinform>tšaŋ</latinform> BODY/PERSON.</par>

<par>PTB <reconstruction>*-aŋ</reconstruction> seems to yield Limbu <latinform>-o(ː)ŋ</latinform> in other cases, e.g. BORN <xref ref="70">#70</xref> > Lb. <latinform><emph>poːŋ</emph>-maʔ</latinform>.</par>
<par>Is this form correct? The form on the BM card reads “<latinform>maːt- (maːrɛ/maːt)</latinform> | to run out, to die” </par>
<par>Note assimilation of the medial consonants in Limbu <latinform>thim ba</latinform>.</par>
